market_pulse: Friday peak: LIV Beach featuring Sommer Ray, OMNIA with Steve Aoki, XS featuring past weekends with Chainsmokers—strong competitive talent density across Strip; weekend talent announcements active.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Multiple A-tier DJ bookings across venues (Steve Aoki, Tiësto, Alesso)
High Instagram engagement on day-club announcements
Three-day headline talent announced through Sunday
Beach clubs showing strong social momentum (David Guetta EDC week residual hype)
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Maximize social content push Friday—today's Sommer Ray + weekend lineup. Consider flash promotion on IG/TT for Saturday-Sunday. Monitor Tiësto (TAO) and Aoki (OMNIA) for influencer takeovers.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, XS posting countdown-style Story sequences on event days. LIV minimal Story refresh detected. Risk: Lost real-time engagement on event day morning.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy 3-frame countdown Story series Friday morning (gates open, 2hrs, 30min to go) with behind-the-scenes crew footage + early arrivals.

content_gaps.description: TAO Beach + Encore using high-energy transition tracks in Reels. LIV posts show standard music. Gap in audio freshness.
content_gaps.suggested_action: License trending transition audio (check TT discover for 'club mix' + 'festival edit' trending sounds). Apply to 2-3 Friday night clips.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan R&Bae Wednesday series and post-event talent announcements getting creator RT's. LIV weekend posts less share-driven.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Tag 3-5 mid-tier creators in weekend Stories 24h before event (e.g., Vegas lifestyle TT influencers 50k-200k followers). Offer early entry or table promo.

influencer_activity.mention: Headlining LIV Beach Friday (today). High follower count (17M+). Expected strong reach on event announcement.

OMNIA Nightclub tonight (Friday). TAO Beach past appearances (EDC week). Dual venue presence splits audience.
